narration: Here's what science actually says about randomized controlled trials.

narration: Randomized controlled trials, or RCTs, are the gold standard in research for testing new treatments.
visual_description: Context visual: Randomized controlled trials, or RCTs, are the gold standard in research for testing new treatments.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Randomized controlled trials, or RCTs, are the gold standard in research for testing new treatments.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Randomized controlled trials, or RCTs, are the gold standard in research for testing new treatments.

narration: Participants are randomly assigned to a treatment or a control group, minimizing bias.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Participants are randomly assigned to a treatment or a control group, minimizing bias.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Participants are randomly assigned to a treatment or a control group, minimizing bias.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Participants are randomly assigned to a treatment or a control group, minimizing bias.

narration: This method ensures that any difference in outcomes is likely due to the treatment itself.
visual_description: Evidence visual: This method ensures that any difference in outcomes is likely due to the treatment itself.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: This method ensures that any difference in outcomes is likely due to the treatment itself.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: This method ensures that any difference in outcomes is likely due to the treatment itself.

narration: But not all studies are RCTs, and preliminary research can mislead us.
